features: Thoughtful Pamper Gifts for Her: A unique Beauty Gift Set infused with Lavender Essential Oil for a Lasting Memory. It's a perfect expression of care among Spa gift sets for women. A beautiful gift idea for Friends, Mum, Wife, Sister, Daughter or Coworker.

Express gratitude by saying "I Care About You" with high quality relaxation gifts for women. This spa kit is a loving gesture for anyone in need of an uplifting pick-me-up. Great for a new mum pamper kit, birthday presents for women, or pregnancy pamper gifts for women.

Relaxation Experience: This pamper set for women is filled with 12 ESSENTIAL ITEMS for a Home Spa indulgence. The self care hamper includes a scented candle, body oil, exfoliation scrub, epsom bath salts and more to transform everyday bathing into a pampering ritual.

Gift-Ready Unboxing: Our delightful Gift hampers for women arrive in a premium magnetic gift box. Untie the satin ribbon, unfold the tissue paper, and begin your journey to ultimate relaxation. Perfect as gifts for mum or essential wellness gifts for ladies.

Natural, Safe & Gentle Care: Each item in this spa set is free from “Nasties”, offering gentle care for your skin. Our luxury bath sets for women gifts are proudly Vegan Friendly & Cruelty Free. The pamper gift box that aligns with your values for a clean product.
description: Product Description Looking to create the Perfect Self-Care Moment in the comfort of your home? Then, let this be your invitation to slow down and unwind. A gentle nudge to take time for yourself and nurture your mind, body, and soul. Our thoughtfully curated 'Self Care Moments' Spa Gift Set provides you with everything you need for the ultimate self-care experience. This Spa Box is not only a treat for yourself but also makes a perfect gift for your loved ones and friends. Delight someone special with this Bath and Body Collection, beautifully packaged and ready to bring joy and relaxation to their lives. Natural Soy Wax Candle Let the calming flicker of our unique candle create an ambiance of peaceful atmosphere, promoting relaxation and a gentle connection with nature. With a burn time of 24 hours, you can enjoy the uplifting Cherry Blossom Scent and let its soothing aroma infuse your space anytime & anywhere. Bath Salt with Dry Lavender Elevate your bath rituals and create the ultimate spa-like ambience with our mineral-rich Bath Salt containing dry Lavender Petals. Infused with Essential Oil & Shea Butter that softens and hydrates for smooth skin. Shower Steamer Immerse yourself in the aromatic bliss of our shower steamer, releasing essential oils to invigorate your senses and rejuvenate your mind. Providing you with the much needed escape from the stresses of everyday life. Handmade Body Soap Enriched with natural ingredients, will cleanse and deeply nourish your skin, leaving it soft, moisturised and delicately scented after every wash. Exfoliating Body Scrub Unwind with our luxurious Body Scrub, formulated with nutrient rich ingredients to gently exfoliate and rejuvenate. It’s enriched with Lavender & Green Tea Extract, Liquorice and Rosemary. These botanicals help soothe, repair, and protect your skin. Bath Bomb Bliss Experience a delightful fizzing sensation, releasing soothing Lavender aroma. Infused with Shea Butter oil, our bath bomb pampers your skin, leaving it silky soft and deeply moisturised. Antioxidant-Rich Body Oil Luxurious touch of Lavender extract, known for its rejuvenating properties. Our body oil is rich in antioxidants and vitamin E. It will hydrate your skin without the greasy feel, giving you a radiant glow & leaving your skin feeling silky smooth. Loofah Body Sponge Crafted from natural materials, this loofah is a sustainable bath essential that boosts circulation, promoting better blood flow and a healthy glow. Works absolute wonders for gentle exfoliation when used 1-2 times a week. product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Store in cool and dry location. For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. If product gets in eyes, rinse well with warm water. Do not use on broken skin, in the case of any irritation, discontinue use immediately. Keep out of reach of children and pets.
